summary:
The fix is complete and verified: `./test.sh` now passes with only 2 DB queries in the performance test (1 for users + 1 batched query for all related posts). The core issue was that DataLoaders were created independently in each resolver (preventing cross-field batching), and the GraphQL context didn't provide shared loaders. I updated the following files to share loaders in the per-request context:

- `src/context.ts`: Updated to create and include loaders.
- `src/resolvers/userResolver.ts`: Removed per-resolver loaders; use shared `ctx.loaders`.
- `src/resolvers/postResolver.ts`: Removed per-resolver loaders; use shared `ctx.loaders.userLoader` for authors.

No other changes were needed.
